zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Pernel Longespee於1203年出生在英國時，她的父親William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury27歲，母親Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury17歲。她和Sir Knight Dominus de Burford至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Pernel Longespee于1203年出生在英国时，她的父亲William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury27岁，母亲Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury17岁。她和Sir Knight Dominus de Burford至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: Pernel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Common medieval simplified form of   Petronel  , occasionally revived in modern times as a given name.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Pernel Longespee was born in 1203, in England, her father, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, was 27 and her mother, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, was 17. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir Knight Dominus de Burford.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Pernel Longespee est née en 1203, à Angleterre, son père, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir Knight Dominus de Burford.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Pernel Longespee 1203 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury 27 und ihre Mutter Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury 17. Sie hatte mit Sir Knight Dominus de Burford mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Pernel Longespee è nata il nel 1203 nel England, sua padre, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Sir Knight Dominus de Burford.

ja.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Pernel Longespeeが1203年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisburyは27歳，母Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisburyは17歳であった。彼女はSir Knight Dominus de Burfordとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Pernel Longespee(이)가 1203년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Sir Knight Dominus de Burford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Pernel Longespee nasceu em 1203, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Sir Knight Dominus de Burford.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Pernel Longespee родилась в 1203 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, 17. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir Knight Dominus de Burford.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Pernel Longespee nació en 1203, en Inglaterra, su papá, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Sir Knight Dominus de Burford.
